package.exclusions_text:
- Cross Consultation.
- HIV, HBSAG, HCV Disposable Kit.
- All medications and investigations other than Procedure.
- Diabetic Managements
- Special Equipment Charges.
- Beyond the package days, all services and investigations are charged based on actual costs.

- Room Rents and doctors fee cost beyond 3 days of stay for whatever reason
- Cross Consultation
- Any extra ordinary costly drugs and disposable like Anti D Ig and Baby vaccines
- Tubectomy charges, twin Baby Delivery, Muhurtham charges
- High Risk charges Charged Extra
- All medications and investigations other than Procedure
- Special Equipments Charges
- Diabetic Managements
- Beyond package days All services & Investigations are at actual
package.documentation_notes:
- Clean Markdown / LSCS - Elective: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.
- Clean Markdown / Elective LSCS Package: Medium match via semantic_name_medium_after_cleanup. Likely same package after enhanced normalization; review exact variant/grade before adding to master.
- Excel Markdown / LSCS - PA: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.
- FC History / ELECTIVE LSCS PACKAGE-I: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.

package.exclusions_text_clean:
- Cross-specialty consultations
- HIV, HBsAg & HCV disposable kit
- Any medications or investigations not related to the procedure
- Diabetic management
- Special equipment charges
- Any stay, services, investigations, or consumables beyond the package duration (charged as per actuals)
- Room rent and doctor's fee beyond 3 days of stay
- Extraordinary costly drugs and disposables (e.g. Anti D Ig, baby vaccines)
- Tubectomy charges, twin baby delivery, Muhurtham charges
- High risk charges
